# Photosynthesis makes food

## Short Teaching Summary
Photosynthesis makes food: Foods humans consume originate from photosynthesis. Key detail: Foods humans consume originate from photosynthesis. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
